name: Dry Cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the ginger crosswise into very thin slices. Stack several slices and cut into thin strips. Then cut the strips into fine dice.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat. When hot, add asafoetida, then immediately add cumin. As soon as cumin begins to sizzle, add ginger. Stir ginger just until it begins to brown.
3. Add cayenne pepper, coriander, and turmeric. Stir once, then immediately add the cauliflower florets and salt. Stir for 1 minute.
4. Add water (about 1 cup). Cover the pan and reduce heat to low. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes, or until the cauliflower is tender. Stir occasionally, adding more water if needed to prevent drying out.
5. Remove the lid and let any excess liquid evaporate slightly by increasing the heat. Stir in garam marsala and umchōor (or lemon juice) before serving.
